entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: The crop species being studied for salinity tolerance during germination

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of barley genotypes to tolerate salt stress during the germination process

entities.name: PROTEOMIC PROFILING
entities.description: The technique used to analyze the protein abundance in the mature grain of barley lines

entities.name: OREGON WOLFE BARLEY MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: The specific genetic population (DOM X REC) used for mapping salinity tolerance

entities.name: DOM
entities.description: A parent genotype in the Oregon Wolfe Barley mapping population displaying a specific stress response

entities.name: REC
entities.description: A parent genotype in the Oregon Wolfe Barley mapping population displaying a divergent stress response from DOM

entities.name: 6-PHOSPHOGLUCONATE DEHYDROGENASE
entities.description: A protein found to be more abundant in salinity-tolerant barley lines

entities.name: GLUCOSE/RIBITOL DEHYDROGENASE
entities.description: A protein (Glc/RibDH) found to be more abundant in salinity-tolerant barley lines and associated with salt tolerance in yeast

entities.name: YEAST
entities.description: An osmo-sensitive strain used for heterologous over-expression of barley proteins

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The salt stress condition applied during germination and in yeast growth media

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCUS ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis used to identify chromosome regions associated with salt stress response

entities.name: SALT STRESS RESPONSE
entities.description: The physiological and genetic response of the plant to salinity

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 5H
entities.description: A chromosome region identified as associated with salt stress response and co-localizing with specific proteins

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 7H
entities.description: A chromosome region identified as associated with salt stress response

entities.name: BARLEY TRANSCRIPT MAP
entities.description: A genomic tool used to map the location of identified proteins

entities.name: HEAT-SHOCK PROTEIN 70
entities.description: A protein that co-localized with the QTL on chromosome 5H
